goal: Create a focused waitlist landing page for an AI meeting-notes SaaS.
doneWhen: Hero states the meeting-notes value clearly.
Waitlist email capture has loading, success, and validation/error states.
Page includes concise proof placeholders without fake testimonials.
doNotBuild: Do not add payments or team workspaces.
Do not invent customer logos or real testimonials.
allowedAssumptions: Use a clean B2B visual style.
Keep the first version to one page.
continueIf: The waitlist path is working and copy is still rough.
stopWhen: The builder starts adding account dashboards or billing.
askHumanIf: A real product name, logo, or pricing claim is needed.
smallestRepair: Fix only the missing waitlist, proof-placeholder, or scope issue. Do not redesign the page.
